caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones, sits in a studio environment. He wears a gold chain and a gold watch on his left wrist. He is positioned in front of a microphone, holding the stand with his left hand. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring the text "HUSTLE" and stars, as well as a larger logo that says "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics appear, including a logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and a text overlay that says "CHECK IT!". Another graphic on the right reads "BOSS TALK 101 By Village Media". Throughout the sequence, the man's expression shifts from a neutral look as he speaks into the microphone to a smile, while his head tilts slightly to the side.
